description_long: This is a modern luxury yacht with a streamlined, elongated white hull and a sleek superstructure, floating on a blue water surface. The yacht features multiple deck levels, including an open aft deck with wooden flooring and a sunbathing or lounge area, as well as a partially covered upper deck. Large, dark-tinted windows run along the sides of the main cabin, providing panoramic views and natural light to the interior. The bow is sharply pointed, with visible railings and a small open area at the front, while the stern is squared off and features additional seating or lounging space. The overall design emphasizes smooth, aerodynamic lines and a high-end, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A sleek, modern white luxury yacht with multiple decks, large tinted windows, and wooden accents, floating on blue water. The design features smooth lines, a pointed bow, and spacious lounging areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, central superstructure, and open aft deck with wooden flooring.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated hull, large tinted windows, and layered deck structure with visible lounge areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the squared-off stern, open aft deck, and the full length of the yacht's superstructure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the hull's smooth lines, window placement, and deck arrangement.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a sharply pointed bow, smooth white sides, and a flat transom stern. The hull features a streamlined, deep-V profile for efficient water displacement, with no visible keels or chines. The hull is predominantly white with minimal markings.
attribute_deck_layout: The yacht has at least two visible deck levels: an open aft deck with wooden flooring and lounge seating, and a partially covered upper deck. Walkways run along both sides of the superstructure, and there are railings at the bow and stern. The main deck features large windows and open areas for sunbathing or relaxing.
attribute_cabin_structure: The cabin structure is centrally located, with a sleek, aerodynamic shape and large, dark-tinted windows along both sides. The exterior is smooth and modern, with no visible doors or hatches from these views, and the cabin appears to span much of the yacht's length.
